findings.message: 'Clear, meaningful description' appears twice in Step 6 commit message guidance; 'meaningful' is not actionable or measurable
'short variable names' in Code Style section — threshold is undefined; could encourage overly abbreviated identifiers
Runtime dependencies sharp, pdf-lib, and pptxgenjs use ^ ranges; a compromised patch release could be silently installed on next npm install
The consent check (5-step flow) and EXTEND.md preferences section exist as prose sections but are not organized as a numbered workflow; reduces agent traversal confidence for first-time users
All other skills carry version and metadata.openclaw frontmatter; baoyu-diagram is missing both, reducing marketplace discoverability
'obvious typos' in Step 2 analysis guidance — what counts as obvious is subjective and may lead to inconsistent behavior across runs
Description field opens with [Deprecated: use baoyu-imagine] inline rather than using a dedicated deprecated flag or frontmatter key
Deprecated skill mirrors baoyu-imagine but also lacks a post-generation completion report step

baoyu-image-gen is at v1.56.4 while baoyu-imagine is at v1.58.0; baoyu-imagine documents DashScope wan2.7-image --ref support (line 94) that is absent from baoyu-image-gen (line 90), confirming sync drift
Skill has no post-generation completion report step; agents have no structured success signal after image generation completes
Workflow ends after scripts open the browser; no structured completion report is defined for the overall skill invocation
Workflow ends after scripts open the browser; no structured completion report is defined
Four-item workflow section has no final completion step reporting the saved file path, media status, and quality gate result
Step 0 EXTEND.md search paths reference .baoyu-skills/baoyu-image-cards/EXTEND.md instead of .baoyu-skills/baoyu-xhs-images/EXTEND.md; deprecated skill has no config isolation from its replacement
Description field opens with [Deprecated: use baoyu-image-cards] inline rather than using a dedicated deprecated flag or frontmatter key
baoyu-xhs-images Step 0 EXTEND.md paths point to baoyu-image-cards directories; violates skill self-containment principle in CLAUDE.md and causes config namespace pollution
Workflow section has two items numbered 3 (lines 144 and 145); second item 3 and item 4 should be renumbered to 4 and 5 respectively
Workflow section has two items numbered 3 (lines 144 and 145); second item 3 and item 4 should be renumbered to 4 and 5 respectively
Step 0 EXTEND.md search paths reference .baoyu-skills/baoyu-image-cards/EXTEND.md instead of .baoyu-skills/baoyu-xhs-images/EXTEND.md; deprecated skill has no config isolation from its replacement
